parameters.name: QMQRY
parameters.help:
Query management query (QMQRY)

Specifies the name and library of the query management query to be shown on the Work with Query Management Queries display. A specific or a generic query management query can be specified. Either type can be optionally qualified by a library name.

This is a required parameter.

The possible values are:

Qualifier 2: Library

Although the following Qxxx libraries are provided by IBM, they typically contain user data that changes frequently. Therefore, these libraries are considered user libraries and are also searched:
